hypothesis: Low regime_exit_score Technology trend signals may be over-de-risked by the accepted Technology-specific haircuts; releasing those haircuts for low-score Technology trend candidates could recover delayed winners without changing entries, exits, ranking, LLM behavior, or the universe.
why_not_llm_soft_ranking: LLM soft-ranking remains production-sample limited; this deterministic test used fields already present in shared production/backtest sizing.

avoided_recent_do_not_repeat_families: No Technology trend score-band de-risking retry from exp-20260430-002.
No nearby risk_on score-bucket multiplier tuning.
No Commodity breakout or Energy/Technology breakout risk boost retry.
pre_experiment_checks.candidate_alpha_hypothesis: Technology trend low-score full-risk override is a capital-allocation test: it checks whether accepted Technology haircuts are too punitive for low-score delayed winners.

tested_value.condition: strategy == trend_long and sector == Technology and regime_exit_score < 0.10
tested_value.action: clear Technology-specific gap/near-high/DTE/tight-gap haircuts before risk_on_unmodified sizing

locked_variables: accepted Commodities/Financials/risk_on allocation rules outside this tested override

market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull after accepted allocation stack
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with weakest win rate

gate4_basis: Rejected and rolled back. The shared sizing override damaged mid_weak materially, reduced old_thin EV despite a small PnL gain, and improved zero EV windows.
mechanism_insight: Low regime_exit_score is not enough to justify releasing Technology trend haircuts. The override amplified PLTR/META/MSFT-like weak-window stop-outs more than it recovered AMD/NOW-like delayed winners, so the accepted Technology risk haircuts should stay in force.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft-ranking remains data-limited, so this deterministic capital-allocation alpha was tested instead.

rejection_reason: Aggregate EV regressed by -0.1732, aggregate PnL fell by $719.61, mid_weak Sharpe fell by -0.35, and no window improved on EV.
do_not_repeat_without_new_evidence: Full-risk or risk_on-unmodified release of low-score Technology trend haircuts
Using regime_exit_score < 0.10 alone as evidence that Technology trend haircuts are too punitive
Technology trend haircut release without an orthogonal event, news, or lifecycle discriminator
next_retry_requires: A production-shared event/state discriminator that separates AMD/NOW-like delayed winners from PLTR/META/MSFT-like stop-outs
Forward evidence that low-score Technology trend winners dominate weak-window stop-outs
Tail-risk evidence showing any Technology trend risk release does not expand mid_weak drawdown
